creator: bezzubov@gmail.com
text:
I have only one pipe:
00900 21009791 25817826989 pipe tablearg ip from any to table(60) out
00905 13633970  2823363333 pipe tablearg ip from table(61) to any in
table 60 have about 200-300 lines:
